presets.character-left-text-right: Character on left 40-50%, text stack on right 50-60%
presets.character-right-text-left: Character on right 40-50%, text stack on left 50-60%

presets.centered-text-support-symbol: Large centered hook with one support symbol
presets.icon-left-text-right: Support symbol on left, stacked text on right
presets.full-text-band: Dominant typography with optional bottom urgency strip
